component.name: MainScene
component.script:
sub init() print "MainScene init OK"
m.label = m.top.findNode("debugLabel") m.grid = m.top.findNode("videoGrid") m.video = m.top.findNode("videoPlayer")
m.grid.observeField("itemSelected", "onItemSelected")
content = CreateObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode")
for i = 1 to 6 item = CreateObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode") item.title = "Item " + i.toStr() item.HDPosterUrl = "https://peach.blender.org/wp-content/uploads/title_anouncement.jpg" item.SDPosterUrl = item.HDPosterUrl item.url = "https://commondatastorage.googleapis.com/gtv-videos-bucket/sample/BigBuckBunny.mp4" content.appendChild(item) end for
m.grid.content = content m.grid.setFocus(true) end sub
sub onItemSelected() index = m.grid.itemSelected item = m.grid.content.getChild(index)
m.label.text = "Playing: " + item.title
videoContent = CreateObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode") videoContent.streamformat = "mp4" videoContent.url = item.url videoContent.title = item.title
m.video.content = videoContent m.video.visible = true m.video.control = "play"
m.grid.visible = false end sub
function onKeyEvent(key as String, press as Boolean) as Boolean if press and key = "back" if m.video.visible m.video.control = "stop" m.video.visible = false m.grid.visible = true m.grid.setFocus(true) return true end if end if return false end function
